sizing_rule.note: Kelly/Optimal f requires uniform win/loss amounts. Prerequisite condition: validate all historical wins and losses are identical in magnitude before applying Kelly formula f = 2*P - 1 or f = P - Q. If win/loss amounts vary, optimal f calculation is invalid.

source_rule_text: Position sizing using Kelly formula requires that all wins be for the same amount and all losses be for the same amount; otherwise optimal f cannot be correctly calculated.
